title: Wire, cable, wiring systems – LEONI

images.alt: Leoni AG: Sales up in the third quarter but earnings significantly burdened by turbulent market environment
Leoni AG publishes preliminary figures for the third quarter of 2022

desc: LEONI is a global supplier of wires, cables and wiring systems as well as a provider of related development services. The principal customer base is the automotive industry, for which LEONI develops and makes technically sophisticated products: from single-core automotive cables through to complete wiring systems with integrated electronics. Moreover, LEONI’s product range comprises wires and strands, standardised cables as well as special cables and wiring systems for applications in various markets.

Privacy settings
For the provision of our offers, technically necessary cookies are set on this page. In addition, a cookie is set which stores the current status of your privacy setting (selection cookie).
By clicking on "Accept cookies", you consent both to the storage and retrieval of information on your device and to the subsequent processing of data for the presented processing purposes (Art 6 para. 1 lit. a. GDPR). You can revoke your voluntary consent at any time. Further information and setting options can be found in under "Privacy settings" as well as in our privacy policy.
Some providers may transfer data to countries outside the EU/EEA (third country data transfer), e.g. to the US. The level of data protection in these countries may not be comparable to that in EU/EEA countries. There is therefore an increased risk that government authorities may access this data. For more information on security guarantees, see the provider's privacy policy or contact the provider directly.
